title: IOCL Notification 2026 -Apply Online for 582 Trade, Technician Apprentice Posts
description: The Indian Oil Corporation Limited, Guwahati (IOCL Guwahati) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 582 Trade Apprentice and Technician Apprentice Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 10th pass, ITI, 12th, B.Sc., Diploma in Electrical, Electronics, and Mechanical Engineering can apply for the IOCL Notification 2026 . The interested applican...
